Title: Automation Architect / Staff Quality Assurance Automation Engineer
Description: Senior Software Engineer in Test and Full-Stack Developer with extensive experience across the entire software delivery lifecycle — from architecting Angular applications to building enterprise-grade automation ecosystems that ship with confidence.

Proficient in C#, TypeScript, Java, and Python, I design and deliver automation frameworks across multiple paradigms: BDD with Playwright and Reqnroll, API testing with RestSharp, mobile automation with Appium, performance engineering with JMeter on Azure Load Testing, and cross-platform validation via BrowserStack, Sauce Labs, and LambdaTest.
Summary: Architected and implemented comprehensive automation frameworks for UI and API regression suites using Playwright, Reqnroll (Cucumber for .NET), RestSharp, and MSTest. Served as technical lead and mentor, spearheading the team's adoption of these tools and providing ongoing governance across the automation ecosystem.

Collaborated cross-functionally with Product teams to define critical business workflows and identify high-risk areas. Transformed requirements into comprehensive test strategies and robust test scenarios within Azure DevOps, ensuring maximum coverage across core functional paths.

Engineered and executed a full performance and load testing strategy using JMeter with Azure Load Testing to facilitate microservices migration from on-premise infrastructure to Azure Cloud. Conducted rigorous benchmarking to ensure the cloud environment met or exceeded legacy performance and scalability standards.

Architected a high-performance test data generation utility using JMeter to bypass front-end dependencies — simulating direct backend API calls rather than UI automation. Optimized data seeding processes by over 90%, enabling rapid generation of thousands of records on demand.
Extensive experience authoring automation scripts for both hybrid and native mobile applications using TypeScript and C# with Appium and Appium Inspector for element identification and interaction.
Three-plus years maintaining and enhancing AWS Lambda functions written in Python, including debugging, optimization, and deployment within production environments.
Designed and managed CircleCI YAML pipelines for seamless CI/CD integration of end-to-end test flows across multiple environments.
Proficient in cloud-based cross-browser and cross-platform testing using BrowserStack, Sauce Labs, and LambdaTest.
Executed UI regression suites on Selenium Grid across multiple browsers and operating systems, including IE and Chrome on Windows and Chrome on macOS.
Hands-on experience with AWS services including ECS, ECR, EC2, Lambda, DynamoDB, and SQS in both testing and production support contexts.
Strong backend testing background — validating data against relational databases, supporting data migration initiatives, and executing ETL testing across complex data pipelines.
Proficient in writing complex SQL queries with deep knowledge of RDBMS concepts; experienced in executing and debugging UNIX shell scripts.
Skilled in ROI analysis for test automation — evaluating and prioritizing which scenarios deliver the highest value when automated.
Proficient in version control and code management using GitHub, TFS, and ALM; experienced in code review workflows and release management.
Proven ability to manage multiple concurrent projects and enhancements while maintaining quality and delivery timelines.
Experienced engineering leader — mentored team members on test strategy, automation methodologies, and script development; led and supervised QA teams across projects.
